expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original
expectations.evidence: Original: 'The results show that the proposed method' → Rewritten: 'The findings demonstrate that the proposed methodology' - maximum 3 consecutive words match

expectations.text: Uses more advanced vocabulary (e.g., demonstrates, superior, notable)
expectations.evidence: Uses demonstrates, superior, attains, enhanced, notable, methodology, exhibits, effectiveness
Core meaning intact: proposed method outperforms existing approaches with higher accuracy
